falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant upward move would contradict the blowoff pattern and invalidate the HOLD signal, suggesting a bullish reversal instead of a crash.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume decreases by 40% from the 30-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Low volume during a potential blowoff phase would indicate lack of conviction, falsifying the blowoff score and pattern similarity assumptions.

falsification_conditions.condition: Price does not break below $25,000 (2022 May Luna bottom level)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Failure to reach the historical support level would disprove the pattern match and suggest the current scenario is not a repeat of the 2022 bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
